title: sagina maxima
intro: Sagina maxima, also known as great pearlwort, is a low-growing, perennial herb in the caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of sagina maxima include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of sagina maxima often involve infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical remedies.
